description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a spacious, L-shaped layout with large windows and sliding glass doors. The exterior is finished in dark gray cladding, complemented by a paved patio area that includes a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and a glass-enclosed gazebo. The main entrance is marked by a wooden door and a wide garage door, both facing the street. The backyard area is designed for leisure, with a covered patio, outdoor dining set, and sun loungers beside the pool. The windows are arranged in long horizontal bands, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with dark gray cladding, large windows, a swimming pool, and extensive outdoor living spaces including a gazebo and patio furniture.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the rear and side of the bungalow, highlighting the swimming pool, gazebo, outdoor seating, and covered patio area.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the front facade with the main entrance, large garage door, and a glimpse of the pool and backyard amenities.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the long side of the bungalow with horizontal windows and the backyard leisure area, including the pool and gazebo.
description_view_3: View 3 focuses on the backyard, showcasing the pool, gazebo, sun loungers, and the covered outdoor dining area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with long horizontal windows and grouped side windows
